name: Snail Mucin
description: A complex blend of glycoproteins, hyaluronic acid, and glycolic acid secreted by snails.
scientificSummary: Encourages cell regeneration, locks in moisture, and speeds up the healing of blemishes.
mechanismOfAction: Encourages cell regeneration, locks in moisture, and speeds up the healing of blemishes.

seo.title: Snail Mucin - Clinical Profile & Compatibility | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover the scientific benefits, compatibility, and clinical profile of Snail Mucin in skincare.
